data.title: Update INSTALL.md with two-channel documentation
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update the Installation section of INSTALL.md to document the two-channel plugin model. Add a "Release Channels" subsection below the existing Installation section.

## File to Modify
- INSTALL.md

## Content Requirements
Add a subsection with:
(a) Install command for dso stable channel: /plugin install dso@digital-service-orchestra
(b) Install command for dso-dev dev channel: /plugin install dso-dev@digital-service-orchestra
(c) Recommendation to enable auto-update on the marketplace via the /plugin UI
(d) One-line version semantics: "dso advances on tagged releases; dso-dev advances on every merge to main"

Preserve all existing content. The existing single-channel install commands should be updated/contextualized as the stable channel commands.

## Unit Test Exemption
Markdown documentation with no conditional logic, no executable behavior. Unit Test Exemption Criterion 3 applies: "static assets (Markdown documentation) where no executable assertion is possible."

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] INSTALL.md contains install command for stable dso channel
  Verify: grep -q 'dso@digital-service-orchestra' INSTALL.md
- [ ] INSTALL.md contains install command for dso-dev channel
  Verify: grep -q 'dso-dev@digital-service-orchestra' INSTALL.md
- [ ] INSTALL.md contains auto-update recommendation
  Verify: grep -q 'auto-update' INSTALL.md
- [ ] INSTALL.md contains version semantics statement (tagged releases + every merge)
  Verify: grep -q 'tagged releases' INSTALL.md && grep -q 'every merge' INSTALL.md
